transcript.text:
The video was taken before the spread of the Corona19 Virus. We are fully aware of the seriousness of the situation and we are currently refraining from filming outdoors in order for it to not adversely affect further spread. We wish for a speedy recovery for those affected.
[Vegetable hater Tzuyang]
[This is the Tzuyang we've seen over the past year]
I didn't put any vegetables in here
I'm sorry, veggies
[This is for picky-eater Tzuyang]
[Tzuyang goes to the temple]
My mother would force me to eat it, but I still didn't
[I am not your mother]
[Spinach and Bean Sprouts seasoned by the monk]
[A colorfully decorated plate]
[Silence]
[Dumplings filled with dried radish greens]
He put so much effort into this meal
[Knocked out]
Hello everyone~

Guess where I'm at today?
I'm at a head temple located in Boeun county
You guys know I eat a lot of unhealthy and greasy food
It'd be hard to do it on my own, so
I'm here to do a temple stay to eat healthy
And to clear my mind
These places only serve vegan meals
[Sigh]
[Welcome to the world of vegetables]
[This is horror itself for Tzuyang]
[Welcome to veggie-world]
Hello~
What bring you here?
My name is Monk Il-Oh, the guide for this head temple
Nice to meet you
I always eat unhealthy food

The food here is great, that's why they call it the Food Temple
So.. no meat at all? Right
But we make dishes made with mushrooms which taste like beef
So.. no chicken eggs either?
No eggs
Do I need to turn my phone in?
Of course
You guys always do this?
Yes we do
That cellphone is my life
It may be uncomfortable, but you make great memories here
I hope you get the most out of it today
[Tzuyang's Vegan Experience]
I really can't leave any leftovers
Even when I was young, I have never...
My mom would force me to eat greens, and I never did

I'm worried
[Do not worry]
It ripped
[Pretty this time]
[Well-seasoned vegetables]
[Zucchini Pancake made with starch powder]
[Hand-made dried cabbage greens dumplings]
Thank you for the food
This meal is so beautiful
I can't possibly eat this because it's so pretty
[Yeah nice try]
No really I don't want to ruin it
[Aged Kimchi Perilla Soup and Burdock Rice]
This is sticky rice
I've been wanting to try the dumplings
Looks good

[I trust you]
[Lie Detector]
It's filled with cabbage
That was pretty good
No, really Why're you laughing?
It tastes good
No
Nevermind
I can eat bean sprouts too
The taste of nature
Seasoned spinach
I'm craving meat already
No,
What is this?
Bell peppers?
I can't eat this

[BIggest hardship in her 24 years of life]
Zucchini pancake is delicious
So tasty
[Sorcery that makes zucchini pancakes delicious for Tzuyang]
I eat all the skewers and assorted pancakes during the holidays
But I never eat the zucchini one
Now I will be grateful for zucchini pancakes
Really
It's so good
I'd rather eat 100 of these right now
Dried cabbage
[Palate cleanse]
[Help me]
But..
Isn't this too much food for 1 person?
It's tasty, but

I don't think this is 1-serving
But you eat 15 servings
I would like 1-serving of food today
I think I'll lose like 10kg if I eat like this everyday..
I'm not feeling too good
[Not making any progress]
[Today's Lesson] I've been living such a happy life
I didn't miss my mom during my middle school and high school campfires
But I miss my mommy dearly today
Did your cooking get better? Why?
It's so delicious!
Who gave birth to you? You're so pretty
I miss my mommy
It won't go down my throat
[Lessons from Veganism] [1) Health 2) Filial Piety]
I felt sick when I ate vegetables

And I would lose my appetite
I used to feel like vomiting every time
I'm just saying..
I don't think I'll ever be able to eat vegetables again
I'm feeling really sick Is there a phobia for it?
[But I will try my best]
[The only thing she can tolerate: Zucchini Pancakes]
These zucchini pancakes are really good It's different from the other I've had
This is pretty serious Was I born this way?
What's so different about me from the people that are good at eating vegetables?
Did you eat a lot? Yes, I am enjoying the food
[Let's see]
It's not for you, right?
No no~ You ate a good amount
The food is really yummy
But I'm just not too good at eating vegetables

Well it's not too big of a problem now because you're still young
But when you grow older, vegetables will be your main source of energy
Try the watercress Dip it in the chili pepper sauce with vinegar
Okay
It's going to taste good
[Amazing?]
This will prepare you to become a healthy grandmother later on
I do think that I need to eat vegetables for the sake of my health
But I think I was just born this way I'm not sure
It's shocking
We made a lot of food for you
It's a bit shocking
[Tzuyang only eating 1-serving of food]
Forcing yourself to eat will also create stress
So eat what you can
Thank you

Thank you for the food Take your time
Would you like more dumplings?
Oh no way it's okay It's totally fine
I'm trying to eat less today
[Let's eat the rest]
[She is trying her best to finish the food]
[Taking a break]
That's beautiful
[Such food with such scenery]
What do I want to eat right now?
I would have to think very carefully
#3 - Pork Belly
#2 - Steak Tartare
#1 - Beef KBBQ
I really want some
I want to eat it

If someone was eating beef next to me, I would've escaped by now
Really If someone here is eating beef
I'm going to run down the mountain
[Let's finish the food they prepared for me]
[Wash it down]
[We're almost there]
[It's still a struggle no matter how much she eats]
[Finishing it up with some soup]
[Very nice]
I am so thankful for the meal they prepared
I feel very healthy from eating this meal because this isn't my typical meal
I learned the preciousness of both meat and vegetables today
I'm sleepy Because I don't have my phone
I'm so bored without it
[Let's just take a nap]
There's not much to do without your phone

[Playing by herself]
I'm bored without my phone,
But I think it's okay for 1 day
All the worries and stress are away
[Making a snowman]
[Lonely Big-Eater]
My family and I used to make huge snowmans back in the day
You need a nose!
[Now for the arms]
This looks like chicken feet
I want to eat it
[Really taking her time into this snowman]
[Buttons too]
[Now for its name]
[And a headband]
[Chaesik the snowman]

I'm leaving now
Don't melt
During the winter
This is sad
I better go
I want to take a picture, but I don't have my phone
Goodbye
[Nuna, don't forget Chaesik..]
[I'll remember you]
[Moving towards the sound]
[Counting is so fun]
[What No-Meat and No-Phone does to you]
Are you having a hard time practicing veganism? No no it's okay
Go eat some fruits
Really? Can I?
I love it

Yay fruits!
Cute!
Can I play with it? Yes
Thank you
So cute
[I have a new friend]
Hi
[Tzuyang, becoming 1 with nature]
Do you want some pineapples to help you digest?
No no no it's okay
It's fine, it's hard to carve out the pineapples
[Dessert time]
To help you digest
Thank you so much
Do you want more?
Fruits were this delicious?

I'm so happy
I'm not realizing how delicious fruits are
I think I can live here
[Finally end of the day]
I'm starving
So hungry
I don't think I can eat dinner from here
I'm going to escape from here
I'm so sorry, I'm really hungry
Are you going to eat some beef? Beef? No way~
I really want some beef right now
Since I learned the importance of beef..
Do I make a lettuce wrap?
That looks delicious
Cut into big pieces so the meat juice doesn't drip out
[The best KBBQ of her life]

It's so good
Why's this so good?
#3 is pork belly..
I apologize
Lettuce wrap
I'll just eat meat even if it's unhealthy for me
#2 is steak tartare Is this seasoned?
[No lettuce wrap this time]
[A realization of the carnivorous diet]
[A Total Defeat]
Tzuyang's Vegan Experience -The End [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
